title: hieracium eriopogon subsp. maladettae
intro: Hieracium eriopogon subsp. maladettae is a plant species of the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a subspecies of Hieracium eriopogon. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium eriopogon subsp. maladettae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
